name: Apple Slice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apple juice concentrate, sugar, and egg white in a bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, cinnamon, ginger, and salt), mixing until just combined.
3. Pour the batter into a 9-inch round non-stick baking dish. If the mixture is not smooth like cake batter, add up to 1/8 cup water.
4. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until set.
5. Allow the cake to cool almost completely.
6. Slice the cooled cake in half and fill with softened apple chunks (microwave apple pieces until there is some sauce, then use).
7. Mix icing sugar with enough milk to make a thin glaze, adding red food coloring as desired.
8. Ice the cake before serving.
Note: The recipe can be doubled if needed.
